# GroomHub

> The Pacific Northwest's most comprehensive dog grooming directory. Find verified groomers in Washington and Oregon.

## About

GroomHub helps pet owners find trusted, verified dog groomers across the Pacific Northwest. We cover 262+ grooming businesses in 109 cities across Washington and Oregon.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://groomhub.com/
- Browse All Cities: https://groomhub.com/dog-grooming
- Washington Groomers: https://groomhub.com/dog-grooming/wa
- Oregon Groomers: https://groomhub.com/dog-grooming/or
- All Services: https://groomhub.com/services
- All Specialties: https://groomhub.com/specialties
- Cat Grooming: https://groomhub.com/cat-grooming
- Mobile Grooming: https://groomhub.com/mobile-grooming

## Services Offered by Listed Groomers

- Full Groom (bath, haircut, nail trim, ear cleaning, styling)
- Cat Grooming (lion cuts, sanitary trims, feline-specific)
- Nail Care (trimming, grinding, pawdicure)
- Dog Bath (bath & brush, premium shampoos, blow-dry)
- Mobile Grooming (at-home, fully equipped vans)
- Self-Wash (DIY stations with pro-grade equipment)
- Teeth Cleaning (non-anesthetic dental care)
- Deshedding (undercoat removal treatments)
- Ear Cleaning (cleaning, hair removal)
- Puppy Grooming (first groom, socialization)
- Flea Treatment (medicated baths)
- Hand Stripping (wire-coated breed technique)
- Creative Grooming (pet-safe coloring, artistic styling)
- Boarding & Daycare

## Specialties

- Doodle & Poodle Expert
- Puppy Specialist
- Fear-Free / Anxiety handling
- Large Dogs
- Cat Specialist
- Small Dogs
- Senior Pets
- Eco-Friendly products
- Double Coat Specialist
- De-Matting Specialist
- Breed-Specific Cuts
- Skin Sensitive / Allergy care
- Special Needs Pets
- Reactive Dog Handling
- Long Coat Expert

## Major Cities Covered

### Washington
Seattle, Tacoma, Bellevue, Olympia, Spokane, Vancouver, Kent, Renton, Federal Way, Everett, Kirkland, Redmond, Auburn, Puyallup, Lakewood, Lynnwood, Bremerton, Kennewick, Richland, Yakima

### Oregon
Portland, Eugene, Salem, Bend, Medford, Beaverton, Hillsboro, Gresham, Lake Oswego, Tigard, Corvallis, Albany, Springfield

## For Groomers

Grooming businesses can list for free or upgrade to paid tiers for enhanced visibility, analytics, and booking integration.

- Free listing: Basic business info
- Standard ($39/mo): Photos, services display, analytics
- Featured ($89/mo): Priority placement, booking widget, badges
- Premium ($179/mo): #1 placement, homepage spotlight, lead notifications

## Contact

- Website: https://groomhub.com
- Email: hello@groomhub.com
